َ: (showing that the speaker is part of ٱلْقَالِينَ - those who detest)

26:169:3.m: and my family (object of نَجِّ - save)

26:171:1.m: except (an old woman who remained behind)

26:171:2.m: an old woman (object of إِلَّا - except)

26:172:1.m: then (connects this event to what happened before)

26:173:1.m: and we caused rain to fall

26:173:3.m: an intense rain (as punishment from وَأَمْطَرْنَا)

26:174:3.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to the punishment mentioned earlier)

كَ: refers to the punishment mentioned earlier

26:175:1.m: and indeed (connects to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)

26:175:3.m: surely He is (referring to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)

26:175:5.m: The Most Merciful (describing اللَّهِ, and following العَزِيزُ)

26:176:3.m: of the thicket (referring to the home of the people of Shuaib)

26:177:1.m: when (introducing the time Shuaib spoke to his people)

26:177:5.m: will you not?/why don't you? (addressing those who شُعَيْبٌ is speaking to)

26:179:1.m: so protect yourselves! (command to a group)

26:179:2.m: Allah (object of فَٱتَّقُوا۟ - fear/be mindful of)

26:180:7.m: my reward (object of 'I do not ask you for')

26:180:11.m: the worlds (object of رَبِّ - Lord of)

26:181:1.m: fulfill! (all of you) (command to give full measure in الْكَيْلَ)

26:182:2.m: with the scale (tool for وَزِنُوا۟ - weigh)

26:183:4.m: their things (object of تَبْخَسُوا - do not deprive/shortchange)

26:183:9.m: people who damage things (describes how they act in تَعْثَوْا)

26:184:1.m: and protect yourselves! (command to a group)

26:184:3.m: created you all (connected to الَّذِى - 'The One who created you all')

26:184:4.m: and the large creation/multitude (as object of خَلَقَكُمْ)

26:184:5.m: the ancient ones/earliest generations (who were created before)

26:185:5.m: the people who are deeply affected by magic (connected to مِنَ)

26:186:4.m: a human being (subject of أَنتَ - you are)

26:186:9.m: the liars (object of مِنَ - from among)

26:187:1.m: so make (something) fall! (command to make كِسَفًا fall)

26:188:4.m: with/by what (refers to تَعْمَلُونَ - you do)

26:189:1.m: and so they denied him intensively

26:189:5.m: of the large covering/canopy (object of عَذَابُ يَوْمِ)

26:189:9.m: of a day (owned by الظُّلَّةِ - the shade/cloud)

26:190:3.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to the destruction of the disbelievers mentioned earlier)

26:190:6.m: he was (describes the state of أَكْثَرُهُم/most of them)

نَ: (describes the state of أَكْثَرُهُم/most of them)

26:191:3.m: surely He is (referring to رَبَّكَ - your Lord)

26:191:4.m: the Mighty One (description of رَبَّكَ - your Lord)

26:191:5.m: The Extremely Merciful One (describing Allah العزيز)

26:192:1.m: and indeed it (referring to the Quran)

26:192:2.m: surely it is a sending down

26:192:3.m: master who cares for others (connected to العٰلَمِينَ)

26:193:1.m: he descended (subject of بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ - the trustworthy spirit descended with it)

26:193:3.m: the Spirit (referring to Angel Gabriel in this context)

26:193:4.m: the Trustworthy One (title of الرُّوحُ - the Spirit)

26:194:3.m: so that you may be (from the warners)

26:196:1.m: and indeed it (referring to what was mentioned before)

26:197:1.m: And has it not...? (connects to يَكُن)

26:197:2.m: he is/exists (after لَمْ which makes it negative past)

26:197:4.m: a sign (object of يَعْلَمَ - to know)

26:198:5.m: the foreign-speakers (referring to non-Arabs in this ayah)

26:201:2.m: they believe/have faith (present tense) (subject of لَا)

26:201:3.m: in/with/by it (referring to what they don't believe in)

26:202:1.m: and then it will come to them

26:203:2.m: do/does/did? (asking about مُنظَرُونَ - being given more time)

26:204:1.m: is it with our punishment (that they hasten with يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ)

26:205:1.m: have you seen? (asking about something mentioned in previous ayahs)

26:205:3.m: we provided them with much enjoyment

26:205:4.m: years (object of مَتَّعْنٰهُمْ - we gave them enjoyment)

26:208:1.m: and not (negates the verb أَهْلَكْنَا - destroyed)

26:208:6.m: for it (referring to قَرْيَةٍ - the town/village)

26:211:3.m: for them/to them (speaking about multiple males)

26:212:3.m: the hearing (object of عَنِ - away from)

26:212:4.m: surely they are removed/separated (from السَّمْعِ - hearing)

26:213:1.m: so/then not (connects to تَدْعُ - call upon)

26:213:5.m: a god (object of تَدْعُ - do not call upon)

26:213:7.m: so you would be (result of لَا تَدْعُ - do not call upon)

26:213:9.m: the severely punished ones (among those who will be punished)

26:214:3.m: the closest relatives (object of أَنذِرْ - warn)
